subject: Updating Netlify’s privacy statement
raw_text:
Netlify does not use customer data for AI training.

Hi there,

To support Netlify's evolution from a front-end deployment and hosting site to a platform where anyone can prompt and build, Netlify is updating its Privacy Statement to ensure our terms are as clear as possible.

At Netlify, you own your content. We do not sell your code or content, and we do not use it to train AI models without your permission. Netlify uses Service Data (non-identifying data) to operate and improve the platform. Your customer content is used only to provide our services to you.

We’re sending out this notification to remove any ambiguity and reflect how we have always operated.

You can review the full Privacy Statement (https://communications.netlify.com/e3t/Ctc/I6+113/cVvsj04/VVFt8b8n9s8JW8CQ8nT5xP4y4W2VV8NG5N8k-yN7zrx0K3l5QzW6N1vHY6lZ3mDW5lwQrw4WRM36W8YKCHv5dtPfxW3D5HxY3-FG3XW2Cky8w48blplW8YFhwl8M8hqGW48yKV08bYQLWW2pjw2H5chhTdW63RX-_3jmSKHW65--S57TfsSsW3lvS2H6L3gDgW5T7c0R3yYN9QN3ycMbzrDCWvW7tQ2DK8_rnKQN7GtM3zf2slNW5-twFt55c50mW9fZz_45mtRb1W6DsHdD4Xr7lLW8mkLLs2Xd-05W2kKCNj9kXSRhW21CGHY7fVD4tW4cmV5-5X_mJ-W8HCmqH5qXzrlf2ZZP8W04 ) , along with more detail on our approach to content ownership and AI training data (https://communications.netlify.com/e3t/Ctc/I6+113/cVvsj04/VVFt8b8n9s8JW8CQ8nT5xP4y4W2VV8NG5N8k-yN7zrx103l5QzW7lCdLW6lZ3pmN5xG3YPBz8xyW1qbXSt11Qh6GVLTLmM98HHF_W2-kHmD5vJk9TW9kVFWV6v8kBrVzF_yv1r24zzW2_MWk86-TSDVW2yR8pT51bPVPW4qJG7t32ZVYgW87WyPp4VsWPfW18fb152D-hSfN8jWsZ1936QyW7D8NRB1T9Vq6W62Vh19265LClW1s8-nG6LrjxtW1P76g57bVns0W2ylfb24J64MjW6nzxGr67lj-WW3kMXkb6fxW5pW5387Sx4809f7W2SP2YV3s104yVQB4ds1-n2zsN4WcP0kGPXY7N2h3jv-BtFsWf8V5msx04 ) .

Thank you for being a Netlify customer,

- The Netlify Team
